PL.title: Estimated fiscal Q2 2027 earnings window
PL.summary: Use as a placeholder until the official IR events page confirms the release date and webcast time.

evidence.basis: Planet has typically reported fiscal Q2 results in early September after its July 31 quarter end.
evidence.confirm_with: Planet IR events and press releases

PL.title: Investor day or product/customer update watch
PL.summary: Track IR events and Planet Pulse for investor-day style updates, product launches, customer momentum, and guidance changes.

evidence.basis: Planet hosted Investor Day 2025 in mid October; treat any future repeat as a catalyst watch, not a confirmed event.
evidence.confirm_with: Planet IR events, IR news, and Planet Pulse

PL.title: Estimated fiscal Q3 2027 earnings window
PL.summary: Second high-priority earnings checkpoint after the October 31 quarter end; confirm once Planet posts the announcement.

evidence.basis: Planet announced fiscal Q3 2026 results for December 10, 2025 after market close.
evidence.confirm_with: Planet IR events and press releases
